title: HIVE Digital Technologies Reports October Production of 289 BTC, Achieves 24 EH/s, and Completes Paraguay Expansion While Fueling Canada's Tier III+ AI Data Center Growth
text: HIVE Digital Technologies announced its October 2025 Bitcoin mining results, reporting production of 289 BTC—representing an 8% monthly increase and 147% year-over-year growth. The company has now exceeded 24 exahashes per second (EH/s) of global mining capacity. The company completed Phase 3 of its Valenzuela expansion in Paraguay ahead of schedule, bringing 300 MW of capacity online. This milestone enables HIVE to operate at approximately 25 EH/s with an efficiency rating of 17.5 joules per terahash. Executives highlighted the firm's 'Great Transformation' strategy, converting Canadian facilities from Bitcoin mining infrastructure into Tier III+ AI data centers. CEO Aydin Kilic stated that the company has built a profitable GPU-driven HPC revenue stream over the past three years and emphasized accelerating expansion across both Bitcoin mining and AI computing operations. HIVE is developing AI infrastructure in New Brunswick and Toronto through its BUZZ High Performance Computing subsidiary, positioning itself as a significant green-energy AI developer in Canada. The company plans to release financial results for the six months ended September 30, 2025.
